THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR WESLEY POOLAVSKI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR RUBEN OROZCO IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER CARLA CUEVAS VIA SPEAKERPHONE/VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT PRODUCES REQUESTED DOCUMENTS FOR REVIEW AND BASED ON THAT THE COURT ORDERS THE DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR RUBEN OROZCO TO PAY $500 A MONTH TO PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR WESLEY POOLAVSKI BY CHECK AND MAILED TO HIS ADDRESS. THE FIRST PAYMENT IS TO BE MAILED NO LATER THAN JUNE 15, 2022, AND ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER. THE SEVENTH AND FINAL PAYMENT WILL BE FOR $514.31. IF THIS PAYMENT PLAN IS BROKEN THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR MAY REQUEST TO PUT THIS CASE ON CALENDAR THROUGH FILING OF AN SC-105 JUDICIAL FORM AND A NEW JUDGMENT WILL BE ENTERED. OUTSIDE OF PAYMENTS NO COMMUNICATION IS ALLOWED BETWEEN PARTIES DIRECTLY OR THROUGH 3RD PARTY. SHOULD SUCH COMMUNICATION OCCUR, THE AUTHORITIES SHOULD BE CONTACTED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; BAILIFF: DEPUTY LIU; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
